name: Solo Tool Agent (test fixture)
goal: Plan the rollout of a new internal tool
context: We are a small engineering team. The tool will be used by 20 people initially.
outcome: A clear rollout plan with a guardrail check, a chosen next action, an executor output, and an evaluation.

nodes.title: Intake
nodes.description: Normalize the user goal and identify missing inputs before routing.
nodes.instructions: Restate the user query as a normalized goal and list any missing inputs.

nodes.title: Policy gate
nodes.description: Classify read, write, network, shell, and credential intent against permissions.
nodes.instructions: Decide if the upstream intake is allowed to proceed under default permissions.

nodes.title: Orchestrator
nodes.description: Choose the next action from the active tool pool.
nodes.instructions: Pick a single concrete next action toward the rollout plan.

nodes.title: Executor
nodes.description: Run approved reads or writes and return structured results.
nodes.instructions: Produce the concrete artifact for the next action chosen by the orchestrator.

nodes.title: Eval check
nodes.description: Check output, permissions, and guardrail invariants.
nodes.instructions: Score the executor output against the desired outcome and list any defects.
